params.name: event
params.description: Search for all documents related to a specific event using its Launch Library 2 ID.

params.name: has_event
params.description: Get all documents that have a related event.

params.name: has_launch
params.description: Get all documents that have a related launch.

params.name: is_featured
params.description: Get all documents that are featured.

params.name: launch
params.description: Search for all documents related to a specific launch using its Launch Library 2 UUID.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return per page.

params.name: news_site
params.description: Search for documents with a news_site name present in a list of comma-separated values. Case insensitive.

params.name: news_site_exclude
params.description: Search for documents with a news_site name NOT present in a list of comma-separated values. Case insensitive.

params.name: offset
params.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

params.name: ordering
params.description:
Order the result on `published_at, -published_at, updated_at, -updated_at`.

* `published_at` - Published at
* `-published_at` - Published at (descending)
* `updated_at` - Updated at
* `-updated_at` - Updated at (descending)

params.name: published_at_gt
params.description: Get all documents published after a given ISO8601 timestamp (excluded).

params.name: published_at_gte
params.description: Get all documents published after a given ISO8601 timestamp (included).

params.name: published_at_lt
params.description: Get all documents published before a given ISO8601 timestamp (excluded).

params.name: published_at_lte
params.description: Get all documents published before a given ISO8601 timestamp (included).

params.name: search
params.description: Search for documents with a specific phrase in the title or summary.

params.name: summary_contains
params.description: Search for all documents with a specific phrase in the summary.

params.name: summary_contains_all
params.description: Search for documents with a summary containing all keywords from comma-separated values.

params.name: summary_contains_one
params.description: Search for documents with a summary containing at least one keyword from comma-separated values.

params.name: title_contains
params.description: Search for all documents with a specific phrase in the title.

params.name: title_contains_all
params.description: Search for documents with a title containing all keywords from comma-separated values.

params.name: title_contains_one
params.description: Search for documents with a title containing at least one keyword from comma-separated values.

params.name: updated_at_gt
params.description: Get all documents updated after a given ISO8601 timestamp (excluded).

params.name: updated_at_gte
params.description: Get all documents updated after a given ISO8601 timestamp (included).

params.name: updated_at_lt
params.description: Get all documents updated before a given ISO8601 timestamp (excluded).

params.name: updated_at_lte
params.description: Get all documents updated before a given ISO8601 timestamp (included).

items.docs: List spaceflight news articles aggregated from 40+ publishers. Supports full-text search, news-site filtering (include/exclude lists), published_at/updated_at date range filters, related Launch Library 2 launch (UUID) or event (LL2 ID) filters, featured filter, and offset/limit pagination with ordering by published_at or updated_at.

params.name: id
params.description: A unique integer value identifying this article.

items.docs: Retrieve a single news article by its unique integer ID.

items.docs: List spaceflight blog posts (longform commentary, mission updates, and analysis) from participating publishers. Supports the same filtering, ordering, and pagination as the articles endpoint, including Launch Library 2 launch and event filters.

params.name: id
params.description: A unique integer value identifying this blog post.

items.docs: Retrieve a single blog post by its unique integer ID.
Retrieve API metadata including the current API version and the full list of news sites currently imported by SNAPI. Useful for building news-site picker UIs.

items.docs: List official spaceflight reports (mission reports, program updates, and agency briefings) from participating publishers. Supports full-text search, news-site filtering, published_at/updated_at date range filters, and offset/limit pagination with ordering. Note that reports do not carry launch or event relationships.

params.name: id
params.description: A unique integer value identifying this report.

items.docs: Retrieve a single report by its unique integer ID.
